info.title: RobJan.Minecraft.ChunkRemover
info.description: CLI Tool to remove unwanted chunks from a Mineraft world

arguments.name: configfilepath
arguments.description: .yml file with all required info to run the remover.

options.name: --coordinates
options.description: List of coordinates to not remove any chunks around within the range.Format `x,z`. Optinally the reange can be overriden for each coordinate by using the format `x,z,r` where `r` is the range.

options.name: --range
options.description: Range (in chunks) from any specified coordinates where no data will be removed.

options.name: --range
options.description:
(Default: 32) Range (in chunks) from any specified
coordinates where no data will be removed.

options.name: --coordinates
options.description:
Required. List of coordinates to not remove any chunks
around within the range.Format `x,z`. Optinally the
reange can be overriden for each coordinate by using the
format `x,z,r` where `r` is the range.
